title: Smoke-Hot Creamy Pungent Dates Skillet
description: A savory and flavorful Syrian dish perfect for date night, featuring beer-infused dates in a sugar-free-friendly skillet.
instructions: Preheat your tava-griddle to medium-high heat.
In a small bowl, mix the dates with beer, garlic, cilantro leaves, and smoke flavoring blend. Set aside for about 10 minutes.
Melt the sugar-free cream cheese in a saucepan over low heat, stirring continuously until smooth.
Add the smoked date mixture to the melted cream cheese and stir well until incorporated.
Pour the creamy date mixture into your preheated tava-griddle. Cook for about 10 minutes or until golden brown on both sides.
Season with salt to taste before serving.
